metadata.name: Manage Police Response to Bank Alarm

description: A silent alarm is triggered at a downtown bank. An operator must coordinate the police response.

nodes.task_description: Receive a silent alarm notification from 'First City Bank'.
Dispatch the nearest patrol units and provide them with a live feed from the bank's exterior cameras.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends units and provides them with visual intel.

nodes.task_description: Access the building's floor plan from the city database and send it to the responding officers' terminals.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides tactical information to the officers.
